decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the Urzatron lands (Urza's Tower, Power Plant, and Mine) to generate a large amount of mana, allowing for the casting of powerful creatures and spells. The deck aims to control the game by using removal spells like Breath Weapon and Candy Trail, while also providing card advantage and flexibility with cards like Prophetic Prism and Ancient Stirrings. Additionally, the deck includes threats like Maelstrom Colossus and Pinnacle Kill-Ship to pressure the opponent once the Urzatron lands are established.

This deck focuses on quick, aggressive plays using cheap creatures and burn spells to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It also utilizes artifact creatures and equipment to enhance its creatures and give them extra abilities. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a constant stream of threats and direct damage, aiming to defeat them before they have a chance to stabilize or mount a defense.

The main idea behind this deck is to maintain control of the game through cheap and efficient spells, while also quickly deploying threats in the form of low-cost creatures. By combining card draw and counterspells with aggressive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Cryptic Serpent, this Mono Blue Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of pressure and disruption. The inclusion of bounce spells like Tolarian Terror and Sleep of the Dead also helps to maintain tempo and disrupt the opponent's board development.

This Mono Blue Terror deck focuses on controlling the game through powerful spells and creatures. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's plans with counterspells like Counterspell and bounce spells like Vapor Snag, while filling up the graveyard with cards like Mental Note and Thought Scour to enable the casting of Cryptic Serpent. Lórien Revealed provides card advantage, while Sleep of the Dead can shut down opposing threats. The deck also includes a Murmuring Mystic for creating bird tokens and cantrips like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Preordain to dig for the right answers.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts that generate value and can be sacrificed for additional benefits, while also incorporating removal and burn spells to control the board and put pressure on the opponent. By sacrificing artifacts and utilizing spells like Galvanic Blast, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total and win the game through aggressive plays and efficient resource management. The mana base is optimized to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors while also enabling the deck's synergies and abilities.

The deck focuses on utilizing Golgari/Jund control elements to create a resilient and sustainable board presence. It aims to control the game by using removal spells like Cast Down and Tragic Slip, while also generating value through cards like Ichor Wellspring and Cauldron Familiar. The deck also incorporates a token strategy with cards like Khalni Garden and Troll of Khazad-dûm, leveraging Pestilence and other win conditions to grind out the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a slow, grindy game.

The focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of low-cost creatures and efficient counter spells. By utilizing cheap creatures like Faerie Miscreant and Moon-Circuit Hacker, as well as disruptive cards like Spell Pierce and Spellstutter Sprite, the deck aims to maintain control of the board while dealing damage quickly. The inclusion of cards like Snap and Ninja of the Deep Hours allows for additional card advantage and tempo advantage in order to outpace the opponent. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements such as counterspells and removal spells to dominate the opponent's board. It relies heavily on the value generated by Ephemerate to recycle key cards like Mulldrifter and Archaeomancer for repeated advantage. The inclusion of card draw spells like Preordain and Brainstorm helps to dig for key pieces, while cards like Augur of Bolas and Counterspell provide early game defense. The deck also includes a small burn package to provide additional reach if needed.

The deck focuses on quickly and aggressively dealing damage to the opponent through a combination of burn spells and aggressive creatures. Utilizing low-cost cards like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper, along with the prowess ability of cards like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Grab the Prize and Voldaren Epicure to maintain card advantage and provide additional threats on the battlefield. Overall, the strategy revolves around dealing damage quickly and efficiently to secure victories.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and continuously pressure the opponent with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. Cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery help to maintain card advantage while dealing damage. Overall, this deck is designed to be fast-paced and relentless, constantly keeping the opponent on the back foot and eventually winning through sheer aggression.

The main concept of this deck is to create early pressure on the opponent by efficiently dealing damage through direct burn spells and aggressive creatures. Cards like Lightning Bolt, Fireblast, and Fiery Temper help to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. Guttersnipe provides additional damage every time an instant or sorcery is cast. The deck also includes ways to generate card advantage and maintain board presence with cards like Faithless Looting and Sneaky Snacker. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, consistent damage before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low-cost, aggressive creatures and efficient burn spells. By flooding the board with creatures like Goblin Bushwhacker and Burning-Tree Emissary, supported by direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast, the goal is to finish off the opponent before they can stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Rally at the Hornburg and Wrenn's Resolve ensures that the aggression can be maintained even if the opponent manages to slow down the assault.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize a combination of card draw, land ramp, and fog effects to stall the game and protect yourself while assembling the key combo pieces needed to secure victory. By efficiently cycling through your deck, ramping up your mana base, and preventing damage with fog effects, you can outlast your opponent and set up powerful combos like infinite mana loops or overwhelming card advantage. This deck aims to control the game until it can execute its game-winning combos.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt opponents' strategies through a combination of countering spells, removing threats, and generating card advantage. The deck utilizes cards like Contaminated Aquifer and Tolarian Terror to control the board while also using card draw effects such as Lórien Revealed and Thought Scour to maintain a full hand of options. The inclusion of disruption spells like Snuff Out and Cast Down allows the deck to effectively deal with opposing threats, while cards like Gurmag Angler and Murmuring Mystic provide win conditions to close out games.

This deck focuses on quickly attacking the opponent with aggressive creatures while burning them with direct damage spells. By utilizing cards that deal damage both to creatures and players, the deck aims to maintain a steady stream of pressure on the opponent, leading to a swift victory. The strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of creature damage and burn spells, allowing for a flexible and dynamic approach to winning the game.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy centered around cheap spells and efficient creatures. By utilizing card draw, counterspells, and disruptive effects, the deck aims to maintain control of the game while applying consistent pressure to the opponent. With a low mana curve and a focus on tempo, Mono Blue Aggro seeks to quickly establish board presence and disrupt the opponent's game plan, ultimately leading to a swift victory through efficient play and smart decision-making.
